channel.title: Night View on Qingchen Yu
channel.description: Recent content in Night View on Qingchen Yu

item.title: A Night Visit to the Temple of Heaven
item.description: Exploring the Temple of Heaven (Tiantan) at night offers a completely different perspective from the daytime crowds. As dusk falls, the Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests is illuminated, its golden roof gleaming against the deepening blue of the twilight sky. It is a moment of perfect tranquility and majesty. The Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests | 夜暮中的祈年殿
